data.content: Adjusted global Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R repo cycling to read activeRepo + repo registry from useAppStore.getState() at keypress time, eliminating stale-closure stalls at list boundaries; kept wraparound behavior and all-screen scope. Updated beats-page layout guard test accordingly. Quality gates in worktree passed: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1962 pass), NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
